basic_details.job_title: NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026: Apply for Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor & Non-Teaching Posts at National Sports University Imphal
basic_details.post_name: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Deputy Controller of Examinations, Assistant Librarian (withdrawn), Section Officer, Private Secretary, Assistant Section Officer, Physiotherapist, Accountant, Library Assistant (withdrawn), Nursing Attendant
basic_details.short_information: National Sports University (NSU) recruitment 2026 has been announced by the National Sports University, Imphal, Manipur, a Central University under the Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports, Government of India. NSU has invited applications for various teaching and non-teaching posts, including Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Deputy Controller of Examinations, Section Officer, Private Secretary and more. Interested and eligible candidates can apply offline (with hard copy submission mandatory) on or before 31 July 2026. This article covers the complete NSU recruitment 2026

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 22 June 2026 Withdrawal Notice for Library Assistant Post: 24 June 2026 Last Date to Submit Application: 31 July 2026 | The official notification does not mention a separate exam date or interview date at this stage. Candidates should keep visiting the official NSU website for updates on further selection stages.

application_fee.details: All applicants are required to pay a non-refundable processing fee of Rs. 1,000/- per post. SC/ST/PWD candidates and women candidates are exempted from the application fee. | Bank: HDFC Bank, Chingmeirong Branch Account Number: 50100366687337 IFSC Code: HDFC0004744 Account Name: National Sports University 01 | Candidates must enclose the transaction slip for the fee deposited along with the application form. Those applying for more than one post must submit separate applications with the prescribed fee for each post.

age_limit.details: The official notification specifies age limits only for select non-teaching posts, as shown below. For teaching posts, age of superannuation follows UGC/Government of India norms rather than a fixed upper age limit at entry. | Post Name Age Limit Section Officer 45 Years Private Secretary 45 Years Assistant Section Officer 40 Years Physiotherapist 35 Years Accountant 35 Years Nursing Attendant 30 Years | The notification does not specify age relaxation details for reserved categories; candidates are advised to check the official website for any updates or corrigenda.

qualification.details: Eligibility for NSU recruitment 2026 varies by post and includes educational qualification, relevant experience and, for most non-teaching posts, an upper age limit. Details for each post are given below. | Professor (Physical Education): Master's Degree in Physical Education (M.P.Ed) or Master in Physical Education and Sports (M.P.E.S) with minimum 55% marks; Ph.D. in a concerned/allied discipline with published work; minimum 10 years of teaching/research experience as Assistant Professor/Associate Professor/Professor; minimum 10 research publications with a research score of 120 as per UGC Regulations 2018. Alternatively, an outstanding professional with a Ph.D. and 10 years of relevant experience may also apply. Associate Professor (Sports Medicine): MD/DNB (Sports Medicine) recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC), or MS (Orthopaedics)/MD (Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation) with at least 2 years' experience in Sports Medicine; minimum 4 years' experience as Assistant Professor in a related field at an NMC-recognized institution; at least two research publications as per NMC norms; completion of Basic Course in Medical Education Technology (MET) and Basic Course in Biomedical Research (BMR). Assistant Professor (Sports Coaching – Athletics): Master's degree with 55% marks in Sports Coaching or a relevant/allied subject, OR M.P.Ed./M.Sc. (Sports Sciences)/M.S.S./M.P.E.S. with 55% marks plus a Diploma/PG Diploma in Sports Coaching in Athletics. NET/SLET/SET is not required for the Sports Coaching discipline. | Deputy Controller of Examinations: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks; minimum 9 years' experience as Assistant Professor at Academic Level-10 and above with experience in educational administration, OR comparable research/higher-education experience, OR at least 5 years as Assistant Registrar or equivalent at Level-10. Assistant Librarian: Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science with at least 55% marks and a consistently good academic record; must qualify NET/SLET/SET or an equivalent UGC-approved national-level test. Section Officer: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline; three years' experience as Assistant/Assistant Section Officer (ASO) in Level 6, or eight years as UDC in Level 4, in a Central/State Government body, university, PSU or autonomous institution; proficiency in computer operation, noting and drafting. Private Secretary: Bachelor's Degree; three years' experience as Personal Assistant in a Central/State Government, university, research establishment or PSU; knowledge of computer applications. Desirable: stenography speed of 120 wpm (English) or 100 wpm (Hindi). Assistant Section Officer: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline; three years' experience as UDC in Level 4 in a Government/PSU/autonomous body, OR three years in administrative/academic/finance roles (two years in a higher-education institution); proficiency in typing, computer applications, noting and drafting. Physiotherapist: Bachelor's Degree in Physiotherapy from a recognized university; four years' experience in physiotherapy at a government or recognized hospital with at least 100 beds. Accountant: B.Com with at least second division, or M.Com/MBA; three years' experience in finance and accounts in a Government/PSU/autonomous body or higher-education institution; knowledge of Tally, PFMS and other financial software. Library Assistant (Withdrawn): This post has been cancelled; qualification details are no longer applicable. Nursing Attendant: 10+2 or equivalent; Diploma in GNM/ANM or equivalent; two years' experience in a government or recognized hospital with 100 beds. B.Sc. Nursing is desirable. | The official notification specifies age limits only for select non-teaching posts, as shown below. For teaching posts, age of superannuation follows UGC/Government of India norms rather than a fixed upper age limit at entry. | The notification does not specify age relaxation details for reserved categories; candidates are advised to check the official website for any updates or corrigenda.

salary_details.details: The notification specifies pay levels as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix but does not mention exact in-hand salary figures or allowances. Candidates can refer to the applicable 7th CPC pay matrix table for the corresponding pay level to estimate the actual salary.

selection_process: The official notification indicates that shortlisted candidates will be called for a written test/interview
and originals of all certificates must be produced at that stage. Specific details on the number of stages

syllabus or exam pattern are not mentioned in the notification. Candidates already in government service must apply through proper channel and produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) and Vigilance Clearance Certificate before or at the time of interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the test/interview.
how_to_apply: Download or obtain the prescribed application form as per the official notification.
Fill out the application form completely and accurately.
Attach self-attested scanned/photocopies of all required testimonials, certificates and supporting documents.
Pay the non-refundable application fee of Rs. 1,000/- (if applicable) and enclose the transaction slip.

Send the completed hard copy application by post to: The Registrar, National Sports University, 2nd Floor, Olympic Bhavan, Khuman Lampak Sports Complex, Imphal – 795001, or submit an advance copy by email to [email protected].
Mention "Application for the post of ________________" on top of the envelope.
Ensure the hard copy reaches the University on or before 31 July 2026. Applications sent only by email without a corresponding hard copy will not be considered.
important_instructions: Candidates are solely responsible for assessing their own eligibility before applying. Suppression of facts or submission of fake documents will lead to disqualification, even after appointment. Qualification and experience will be reckoned as on the last date of submission; no later updates will be entertained. Time taken to acquire M.Phil./Ph.D. will not be counted as teaching/research experience. Good academic record means at least 2nd class with 50% marks at the graduation level. Candidates already employed must apply through proper channel and may submit an advance copy. Call letters for interviews will be sent only by email and also displayed on the official website. The University reserves the right to increase, decrease, fill, or not fill any advertised post without assigning any reason. Selected candidates will be appointed under a written contract as per University norms and governed by the New Pension Scheme (NPS). Any updates, corrigenda or addenda will be published only on the official NSU Imphal website.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 22 June 2026 Withdrawal Notice for Library Assistant Post: 24 June 2026 Last Date to Submit Application: 31 July 2026 The official notification does not mention a separate exam date or interview date at this stage. Candidates should keep visiting the official NSU website for updates on further selection stages.

content_sections.heading: NSU ImphalRecruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The National Sports University Imphal recruitment 2026 notification covers the following teaching and non-teaching posts. Important: The post of Library Assistant has been officially withdrawn/cancelled vide F.No. 34/NSU/ESTB/Recruit (NT)/885 dated 24 June 2026. Candidates should not apply for this post.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligibility for NSU recruitment 2026 varies by post and includes educational qualification, relevant experience and, for most non-teaching posts, an upper age limit. Details for each post are given below. Professor (Physical Education): Master's Degree in Physical Education (M.P.Ed) or Master in Physical Education and Sports (M.P.E.S) with minimum 55% marks; Ph.D. in a concerned/allied discipline with published work; minimum 10 years of teaching/research experience as Assistant Professor/Associate Professor/Professor; minimum 10 research publications with a research score of 120 as per UGC Regulations 2018. Alternatively, an outstanding professional with a Ph.D. and 10 years of relevant experience may also apply. Associate Professor (Sports Medicine): MD/DNB (Sports Medicine) recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC), or MS (Orthopaedics)/MD (Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation) with at least 2 years' experience in Sports Medicine; minimum 4 years' experience as Assistant Professor in a related field at an NMC-recognized institution; at least two research publications as per NMC norms; completion of Basic Course in Medical Education Technology (MET) and Basic Course in Biomedical Research (BMR). Assistant Professor (Sports Coaching – Athletics): Master's degree with 55% marks in Sports Coaching or a relevant/allied subject, OR M.P.Ed./M.Sc. (Sports Sciences)/M.S.S./M.P.E.S. with 55% marks plus a Diploma/PG Diploma in Sports Coaching in Athletics. NET/SLET/SET is not required for the Sports Coaching discipline. Deputy Controller of Examinations: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks; minimum 9 years' experience as Assistant Professor at Academic Level-10 and above with experience in educational administration, OR comparable research/higher-education experience, OR at least 5 years as Assistant Registrar or equivalent at Level-10. Assistant Librarian: Master's Degree in Library Science/Information Science/Documentation Science with at least 55% marks and a consistently good academic record; must qualify NET/SLET/SET or an equivalent UGC-approved national-level test. Section Officer: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline; three years' experience as Assistant/Assistant Section Officer (ASO) in Level 6, or eight years as UDC in Level 4, in a Central/State Government body, university, PSU or autonomous institution; proficiency in computer operation, noting and drafting. Private Secretary: Bachelor's Degree; three years' experience as Personal Assistant in a Central/State Government, university, research establishment or PSU; knowledge of computer applications. Desirable: stenography speed of 120 wpm (English) or 100 wpm (Hindi). Assistant Section Officer: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline; three years' experience as UDC in Level 4 in a Government/PSU/autonomous body, OR three years in administrative/academic/finance roles (two years in a higher-education institution); proficiency in typing, computer applications, noting and drafting. content_sections.heading: Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: The notification specifies pay levels as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix but does not mention exact in-hand salary figures or allowances. Candidates can refer to the applicable 7th CPC pay matrix table for the corresponding pay level to estimate the actual salary.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: All applicants are required to pay a non-refundable processing fee of Rs. 1,000/- per post. SC/ST/PWD candidates and women candidates are exempted from the application fee. Bank: HDFC Bank, Chingmeirong Branch Account Number: 50100366687337 IFSC Code: HDFC0004744 Account Name: National Sports University 01 Candidates must enclose the transaction slip for the fee deposited along with the application form. Those applying for more than one post must submit separate applications with the prescribed fee for each post.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The official notification indicates that shortlisted candidates will be called for a written test/interview, and originals of all certificates must be produced at that stage. Specific details on the number of stages, syllabus or exam pattern are not mentioned in the notification. Candidates already in government service must apply through proper channel and produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) and Vigilance Clearance Certificate before or at the time of interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the test/interview.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Duly completed application form in the prescribed format Self-attested copies of educational certificates and mark sheets Self-attested copy of matriculation/SSC certificate as proof of date of birth (only accepted document for DOB verification) Experience certificates Caste certificate (if applicable) Physical disability certificate (if applicable) Transaction slip for the application fee No Objection Certificate (NOC) and Vigilance Clearance Certificate (for candidates already in service) Equivalence certificate from AIU (for degrees from foreign universities, where applicable)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download or obtain the prescribed application form as per the official notification. Fill out the application form completely and accurately. Attach self-attested scanned/photocopies of all required testimonials, certificates and supporting documents. Pay the non-refundable application fee of Rs. 1,000/- (if applicable) and enclose the transaction slip. Send the completed hard copy application by post to: The Registrar, National Sports University, 2nd Floor, Olympic Bhavan, Khuman Lampak Sports Complex, Imphal – 795001 , or submit an advance copy by email to [email protected] . Mention "Application for the post of ________________" on top of the envelope. Ensure the hard copy reaches the University on or before 31 July 2026 . Applications sent only by email without a corresponding hard copy will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates are solely responsible for assessing their own eligibility before applying. Suppression of facts or submission of fake documents will lead to disqualification, even after appointment. Qualification and experience will be reckoned as on the last date of submission; no later updates will be entertained. Time taken to acquire M.Phil./Ph.D. will not be counted as teaching/research experience. Good academic record means at least 2nd class with 50% marks at the graduation level. Candidates already employed must apply through proper channel and may submit an advance copy. Call letters for interviews will be sent only by email and also displayed on the official website. The University reserves the right to increase, decrease, fill, or not fill any advertised post without assigning any reason. Selected candidates will be appointed under a written contract as per University norms and governed by the New Pension Scheme (NPS). Any updates, corrigenda or addenda will be published only on the official NSU Imphal website.

content_sections.heading: Important Links
content_sections.text: The complete official notification (Advt. No. 12/2026) detailing all posts, eligibility and terms is available on the official NSU Imphal website. As a direct downloadable link was not provided in the source document, candidates should check the careers/recruitment section of the official website below for the notification PDF. Download NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 Official notification pdf

faq.question: Q1. What is NSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NSU Recruitment 2026 refers to the recruitment drive by National Sports University, Imphal, Manipur, for various teaching posts (Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor) and non-teaching posts (Deputy Controller of Examinations, Section Officer, Private Secretary, Accountant, Physiotherapist and others) under Advertisement No. 12/2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for NSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the completed hard copy application is 31 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for NSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1,000/- per post, payable to HDFC Bank, Chingmeirong Branch. SC/ST/PWD candidates and women candidates are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q4. Is the Library Assistant post still open in NSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. The Library Assistant post has been officially withdrawn/cancelled vide F.No. 34/NSU/ESTB/Recruit (NT)/885 dated 24 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. an I apply online for NSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. The application process is offline. Candidates must send the completed hard copy application by post; email-only submissions without the corresponding hard copy will not be considered.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for the Professor (Physical Education) post at NSU?
faq.answer: The Professor (Physical Education) post carries Academic Level 14 of the 7th CPC Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an age limit for teaching posts at NSU?
faq.answer: The notification does not prescribe a specific upper age limit for teaching posts; the age of superannuation follows UGC/Government of India norms.
